en_title: BBC Update on Doctor Who Future Imminent, Showrunner States, Amid Concern Its Return Has Now Been Scrapped or Postponed
cn_title: 《神秘博士》命运即将揭晓，剧集主管称BBC声明在即
subtitle: 急急急急急
opus_summary: 《神秘博士》剧集主管拉塞尔·T·戴维斯确认，BBC将在本月内发布关于该剧未来的官方声明。此前有报道称，原定的圣诞特辑可能被取消或推迟至2027年，且BBC仍在寻找新任主演。戴维斯在BBC广播2台表示，新闻稿正在内部审核中，预计一到两周内发布。粉丝猜测声明可能涉及新合作方、剧集主管或主演人选，但也有分析认为圣诞特辑今年恐难制作。与此同时，有消息称BBC正考虑一个低预算的圣诞替代方案，利用现有布景、减少特效，今年12月或许仍有节目亮相。

paragraphs.en: Doctor Who showrunner Russell T Davies has confirmed that an official update on the series' future will arrive this month, amid reports that its previously-announced Christmas special will no longer be made.
paragraphs.cn: 《神秘博士》剧集主管拉塞尔·T·戴维斯确认，关于该剧未来的官方声明将在本月发布，此前有报道称原定的圣诞特辑将不再制作。

paragraphs.en: Last week, UK tabloid The Sun reported that the series' upcoming return was now likely delayed until 2027 or scrapped altogether , as the BBC's search for a new lead actor continued.
paragraphs.cn: 上周，英国小报《太阳报》报道称，由于BBC仍在寻找新任主演，该剧的回归很可能推迟至2027年，甚至被彻底取消。

paragraphs.en: The days since have seen other, credible reports that the special episode has run into production trouble — and there's a general sense among Doctor Who fans that the show's future remains increasingly uncertain, without a lead actor, a replacement for Disney+ as a co-funding partner, and following a negative response to its most recent seasons.
paragraphs.cn: 此后几天，又有其他可靠报道指出，这集特辑的制作遇到了麻烦——《神秘博士》粉丝普遍感到，该剧的未来愈发不确定：没有主演，尚未找到替代Disney+的联合出资方，且最近几季反响不佳。

paragraphs.en: Speaking today on BBC Radio 2, Davies was questioned about the series and when a new star might be revealed. He replied as follows:
paragraphs.cn: 今天，戴维斯在BBC广播2台被问及该剧以及新主演何时揭晓。他回答如下：

paragraphs.en: "You will get an announcement... there's a press release lumbering through the BBC, which as you know is like the Jurassic period and 57 people have to sign off on every single word. So I promise you, in about a week or two weeks, there will be a press release. And I can hear the gears slowing down even as I say this."
paragraphs.cn: 「你们会看到一份声明……有一份新闻稿正在BBC内部缓慢推进，你们也知道，这就像侏罗纪时期一样，每个字都得57个人签字。所以我向你们保证，大概一到两周内，会有一份新闻稿。甚至在我说话这会儿，我都能听见齿轮慢下来的声音。」

paragraphs.en: Word of a press release has immediately sparked fan speculation, with many suggesting that the BBC was planning to confirm either a new funding partner, showrunner or star — though others suggested the news was more likely that none had been found in time for the Christmas special to be made this year.
paragraphs.cn: 新闻稿的消息立刻引发了粉丝的猜测，许多人认为BBC计划确认新的出资方、剧集主管或主演——但也有人认为，更可能的消息是，今年圣诞特辑的制作已来不及找到任何人选。

paragraphs.en: The series' current situation is being analyzed in minute detail, with fans debating at length another recent interview with Davies (with UK radio station LBC ) in which he noted that he was now "not filming anything until 2027."
paragraphs.cn: 该剧的现状正被粉丝们细致入微地分析，他们长时间讨论戴维斯最近接受英国广播电台LBC的另一场采访，他在采访中提到自己现在「2027年之前不会拍摄任何东西」。

paragraphs.en: Trusted Doctor Who podcast Radio Free Skaro has reported that the Christmas special hasn't been worked on this year and — based on its production sources — rather than being cancelled, was never "started to begin with."
paragraphs.cn: 备受信赖的《神秘博士》播客Radio Free Skaro报道称，圣诞特辑今年并未投入制作，而且根据其制作消息源，这集特辑并非被取消，而是压根「从未开始过」。

paragraphs.en: At the same time, writing on private forum Gallifrey Base in remarks later posted by other users on social media, former Doctor Who Magazine editor Tom Spilsbury also cast doubt on whether the special will end up being made, citing current funding issues within the BBC as the cause.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，前《神秘博士》杂志编辑Tom Spilsbury在私密论坛Gallifrey Base上写道（其言论后被其他用户转发至社交媒体），他也对特辑最终能否制作表示怀疑，并指出BBC当前的资金问题是原因所在。

paragraphs.en: But, today, yet another report has emerged that offers a little more hope. Writing on his Substack blog, Bleeding Cool founder Rich Jonston has suggested that the BBC is moving forward with an alternative, low-budget plan for Christmas using existing sets and without extensive special effects. While what might have been planned as the Christmas special episode may have changed, the report states, something could still materialize this December.
paragraphs.cn: 但今天又有一篇报道带来了一丝希望。Bleeding Cool创始人Rich Jonston在其Substack博客上写道，BBC正在推进一个替代性的低预算圣诞计划，利用现有布景，不使用大量特效。报道称，虽然原本计划的圣诞特辑可能已生变，但今年12月仍可能有节目亮相。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。您可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
